title: Weapon, +1, +2, or +3
summary: You have a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus is determined by the weapon’s rarity.

contentBlocks.text: Weapon, +1, +2, or +3 Weapon (any), uncommon (+1), rare (+2), or very rare (+3)
You have a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus is determined by the weapon’s rarity.
